# Plan: sync-client

Goal: Ship the v2 sync client (sofar-cloud Phase 5.1, the D14 seam): sofar login via RFC-8628 device flow, sofar link, push/pull sync with offline queue + doorbell SSE against api.sofar.sh, importable @alignlabs/sofar/client subpath — release as 0.9.0

Progress: 14/15 tasks done (93%)

## Phase 1 — Client core (config, credentials, HTTP) [done] — 2/2 done

- [x] 1.1 Config + stores: api_url precedence (flag > SOFAR_API_URL > .sofar/remote.json > default), credentials store ~/.config/sofar/credentials.json 0600 keyed by api_url, per-clone sync-state cursor store
- [x] 1.2 HTTP core: authed fetch, typed ApiError from {error:{code,message}}, retry/backoff honoring Retry-After (429/5xx/network only)

## Phase 2 — Login + link [done] — 2/2 done

- [x] 2.1 sofar login: RFC-8628 device flow (poll, slow_down, denied/expired), mint sfr_ token via POST /v1/tokens (--scopes read supported), store credentials, never print token
- [x] 2.2 sofar link --org [--name]: POST /v1/repos idempotent, persist committable .sofar/remote.json; honest 404 copy (not-a-member indistinguishable from no-such-org)

## Phase 3 — Sync engine [done] — 3/3 done

- [x] 3.1 Push: ulid order from genesis on first push, batch split ≤1000 lines AND ≤5MB, partial acceptance + invalid[] surfaced loudly non-fatal, idempotent re-push on 429/5xx/network, per-batch ack cursor persistence (offline queue = log after cursor)
- [x] 3.2 Pull: since-cursor paging with X-Sofar-Cursor, dedupe-by-id import + projection regen, inbound cursor separate from push ack
- [x] 3.3 Doorbell SSE client: data events + heartbeat comments, watchdog + reconnect with backoff, since-cursor pull on every ring and reconnect; sofar pull --watch

## Phase 4 — Surface + docs [done] — 3/3 done

- [x] 4.1 CLI wiring: login/link/push/pull commands, styled confirmations per CLI UI conventions (✓/└, spinners stderr-only animate-gated)
- [x] 4.2 @alignlabs/sofar/client subpath export: src/lib/client.ts entry, build.mjs bundle, self-contained d.ts, side-effect-free import
- [x] 4.3 docs/SPEC.md §Sync client section + invariant wording amendment + README sync quickstart

## Phase 5 — Acceptance + release [done] — 3/3 done

- [x] 5.1 Contract tests vs in-process mock server: device flow, queue, batching/splitting, retry/backoff, cursor logic, 401/404/413/429, idempotent re-push, round-trip, downtime drill
- [x] 5.2 Live E2E behind env flag (SOFAR_LIVE_API): login via manual claim+approve path, round-trip against locally running api.sofar.sh
- [x] 5.3 Version 0.9.0 staged: bump, changelog/README, full suite green, user publishes (OTP)

## Phase 6 — Byte canonicalization (0.9.1) [active] — 1/2 done

- [x] 6.1 Canonical serializeEvent: fixed envelope schema order (v,id,ts,initiative,session,source,actor,user?,type,payload; unknown additive fields preserved after payload), payload keys code-point-sorted recursively, arrays in order — jsonb reordering invisible, writer/puller byte parity; SPEC §Envelope amendment + property/jsonb/idempotence/historical-parity tests
- [ ] 6.2 Version 0.9.1 staged: bump lockstep, full suite green, user publishes (OTP); then sofar-cloud bumps catalog + re-runs fold-parity/integration/drill export leg expecting raw diff zero (active)
